description: Read a Notion page's content including title, blocks, text, and properties. Works for both regular pages and database entries.
author: stillwater

reasoning.research: Notion renders pages as a tree of block elements in .notion-page-content. The page title is in .notion-page-block .notion-record-icon + .notion-title-block span[placeholder='Untitled']. Individual blocks have data-block-id attributes and specific class names per type: .notion-text-block (paragraph), .notion-header-block (H1), .notion-sub_header-block (H2), .notion-bulleted_list-block (bullet). Database page properties appear in .notion-peek-renderer .notion-collection-property.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Load session via token_v2 cookie. Navigate directly to page URL (notion.so/{page_id}). Wait for .notion-page-content to confirm full render. Extract title via .notion-page-block, then all content blocks recursively. Properties via .notion-collection-item cells.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: Notion uses React SPA with Cloudflare protection. Session cookie token_v2 is httpOnly and long-lived. Page rendering takes 3-5s on first load. Wait for .notion-page-content with 15s timeout. Notion does not block automated reading with valid session.
reasoning.performance: Session load 1s + navigation 4s + render wait 3s + extraction 2s = ~10s total.

page_url.description: Notion page URL (notion.so/... or custom domain)

steps.description: Navigate to Notion page and wait for content to render
Verify authenticated — if login page shown, abort with SESSION_EXPIRED
Wait for page block structure to load fully
Extract all top-level content blocks with their IDs and text
Return page content as structured data

text_content.example: This is a paragraph of text.

error_handling.session_expired: Detect notion.so/login redirect — abort with SESSION_EXPIRED error
error_handling.page_not_found: Detect 404 or 'page not found' — return PAGE_NOT_FOUND error
error_handling.empty_page: Return empty blocks array — not an error
error_handling.render_timeout: Retry once with 25s timeout on .notion-page-content, then abort
